# Marketing 5.0 Techniques

**Technique 1: Build a Data Ecosystem. Collect, store, analyze, activate.**

**Technique 2: Deploy Predictive Models. Use AI to forecast behavior.**

**Technique 3: Create Contextual Experiences. Right message, right moment.**

**Case: The Recommendation Engine. A streaming service uses AI to recommend content.**

**Case: The Dynamic Pricing. An airline adjusts prices in real-time based on demand.**

**Case: The Smart Assistant. A chatbot handles routine inquiries, freeing humans for complex issues.**
---

**Case: The A/B Test. Continuous testing improves all marketing metrics.**
**Case: The NPS. Net Promoter Score measures customer loyalty.**
**Case: The Funnel. The marketing funnel is dead. The 5A path is the new model.**
**Case: The CRM. Customer Relationship Management systems are the foundation.**
**Case: The Journey Map. Mapping the customer journey reveals opportunities.**
**Case: The Touchpoint. Every touchpoint is a chance to deliver value.**
**Case: The Dashboard. A marketing dashboard provides real-time visibility.**
**Case: The KPI. Choose metrics that matter, not just what is easy to measure.**
**Case: The Experiment. Run a controlled experiment before full launch.**

**Case: The Feedback Loop. Continuous feedback from customers drives improvement.**
